info.title: VibeStack API
info.description: AI-powered app builder — users describe an app, the platform generates a full Vite + React project with live preview.

bearerAuth.description: Supabase JWT access token. Get from Supabase Auth login flow.

200.description: Array of projects belonging to the authenticated user
Array of chat messages for the project

get.summary: Get sandbox preview and code server URLs
get.description: Returns signed preview and code server URLs for a project sandbox. URLs expire after 1 hour.

post.description: Downloads files from Daytona sandbox and deploys to Vercel. Uses GitHub repo if available.

deployUrl.description: Public URL of the deployed app

400.description: Missing projectId or project has no sandbox

post.description: No auth middleware — Stripe calls this directly. Validates signature before processing.

get.summary: OAuth callback — exchange code for session
get.description: No auth middleware. Exchanges Supabase OAuth code for session and redirects to dashboard.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: OAuth authorization code provided by Supabase

302.description: Redirect to dashboard on success or /?error=<code> on failure

schema.description: 302 redirect — Location header points to /dashboard or /?error=<code>

get.description: Comprehensive system health check covering DB, Daytona, env vars, and rate-limit table housekeeping.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the health check

checks.description: Per-subsystem check results (database, daytona, env_vars, rate_limits, …)

503.description: System degraded or admin endpoints disabled

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the health check

checks.description: Per-subsystem check results (database, daytona, env_vars, rate_limits, …)

get.description: Returns the set/unset status of every required and optional environment variable. Never exposes actual secret values.

status.description: "ok" if all required vars are set, "missing_required" otherwise

purpose.description: Human-readable description of what the variable controls

set.description: Whether the variable is currently set

value.description: Safe display value (only for non-secret vars)

required.description: Status of every required environment variable

purpose.description: Human-readable description of what the variable controls

set.description: Whether the variable is currently set

value.description: Safe display value (only for non-secret vars)

optional.description: Status of every optional environment variable

missingCount.description: Number of required variables that are unset

post.summary: Stream AI agent generation via SSE
post.description: Credit-gated SSE endpoint. Streams AgentStreamEvent events as the orchestrator generates app code. Returns text/event-stream.

message.description: User prompt describing the app to build or change

projectId.description: Project ID to run the agent against

200.description: SSE stream of AgentStreamEvent — events: thinking, tool_start, tool_complete, done, agent_error, sandbox_ready, package_installed, credits_used

message.description: Explanation of why the request was rejected

credits_remaining.description: Credits remaining in the user account
